mapper.sql: id, user_id, total_words, learned_words, mastered_words, total_articles, read_articles, total_listenings, completed_listenings, total_questions, correct_questions, study_days, continuous_days, last_study_date, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user_progress (user_id, total_words, learned_words, mastered_words, total_articles, read_articles, total_listenings, completed_listenings, total_questions, correct_questions, study_days, continuous_days, last_study_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{totalWords}, #{learnedWords}, #{masteredWords}, #{totalArticles}, #{readArticles}, #{totalListenings}, #{completedListenings}, #{totalQuestions}, #{correctQuestions}, #{studyDays}, #{continuousDays}, #{lastStudyDate})
